---
name: Reference Update Check
about: Triggered when Claude Code releases a new version
labels: update-check
---

## Checklist

- [ ] `official-builtins.md` — new built-in tools, commands, or subagent types?
- [ ] `official-builtins.md` — new hook events?
- [ ] `official-builtins.md` — new Agent Teams features?
- [ ] `templates.md` — hook format or settings.json schema changes?
- [ ] `templates.md` — plugin.json manifest schema changes?
- [ ] `pattern-library.md` — new patterns from community harness projects?
- [ ] Update version reference in `official-builtins.md` header
